outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Iran war: US gas hits $4 as Trump tells other nations to 'go get your own oil'
outlets.summary: Focuses on domestic economic impact of war, Trump's inflammatory rhetoric toward allies, and gas price milestone crossing $4.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Iran hits oil tanker off Dubai as fighting continues on all fronts
outlets.summary: Multi-front coverage: tanker attack, journalist kidnapping, Hezbollah rockets, and Trump ally disputes.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump touts attack on Iranian munitions depot as drawdown talks continue
outlets.summary: Emphasizes military successes, Trump's strong negotiating posture, and Iran's weakening position.

outlets.name: HotAir
outlets.headline: Hegseth: 'Decisive' Days Ahead for Iran; Regime 'Fractured'?
outlets.summary: Analysis of Pentagon briefing, regime fractures, and whether war objectives are being met.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war: What is happening on day 32 of US-Israel attacks?
outlets.summary: Comprehensive day 32 summary covering military, diplomatic, and humanitarian dimensions.

outlets.name: Middle East Eye
outlets.headline: China and Pakistan issue five-point plan for 'immediate ceasefire'
outlets.summary: Focus on China-Pakistan peace initiative as first formal ceasefire plan from major power.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Hezbollah hits north with rocket barrage; IDF strikes launchers
outlets.summary: Detailed coverage of northern front fighting, Hezbollah rockets, and IDF response operations.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Netanyahu: Iran at its weakest thanks to US-Israel cooperation, regime change possible
outlets.summary: Netanyahu's assessment that war has achieved over half its aims and regime change is within reach.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Rift between Pezeshkian and IRGC chief Vahidi deepens over war management
outlets.summary: Reports on internal power struggle between president seeking ceasefire and IRGC hardliners wanting continued resistance.

outlets.name: NCRI
outlets.headline: Iran executes two PMOI members without notice; IRGC recruiting fighters age 12+
outlets.summary: Internal crackdown: execution of opposition members, child soldier recruitment amid manpower shortages.
